calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: staged goal-stream SD-054 curriculum S0-S3 (621 decomposition)
items.note: Four-stage goal-stream diagnostic following V3-EXQ-621/621a (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding). 621 measured z_goal=0 likely because script omitted z_goal_enabled + update_z_goal per step; 622 fixes both. S0 goal-only+feed (drive_floor=0.9, transient benefit, reef spawn, rich resources) -> prove z_goal>=0.1. S1 mild hazard HFA=0 anneal drive_floor -> goal persists. S2 HFA+bridge anneal -> wanting/liking vs harm. S3 full SD-054 target eval -> arbitration. 1 condition x 3 seeds; PASS=ladder S0&S1&S2&S3 all pass per seed. Dry-run 2026-05-31T21:22Z: boots 3/3 seeds, S0 z_goal peak 0.32/0.25 on seeds 43/44. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. episodes_per_run=130 (40+30+30+30).

items.title: scaffolded_sd054_onboarding substrate-readiness (621a: emit_outcome + P1 survival diagnostics)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-621 (ree-cloud-3 2026-05-31T20:23Z). Root cause of runner ERROR: script omitted emit_outcome() sentinel (subprocess exit=0, manifest outcome FAIL). 621 scientific result: FAIL (C1 4/12 cells complete; C2 z_goal=0 everywhere; C3 approach_commit lift in ARM_1 seed 42 only). 8/12 scaffolded cells failed Fix D P1 survival gate (median last-10 episode length < 75; observed medians 9.5-60). 621a re-runs identical 4-arm x 3-seed acceptance with emit_outcome + per-cell P1 episode_lengths[] in manifest for survival-gate autopsy. claim_ids=[Q-045, MECH-313, MECH-260] unchanged (same substrate-readiness diagnostic). experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Dry-run smoke 2026-05-31T20:40Z: 12/12 cells boot, verdict lines + emit_outcome path verified.
